action.reasoning: Observation: The training script continues to crash with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). The main issues are: 1) The model architecture is overly complex with multiple nested loops and reshaping operations that might be causing memory issues. 2) The approach of processing each time step individually and then applying LSTM might not be efficient. 3) There could be issues with how the GCN layers are applied to the reshaped data. I need to simplify the model significantly to avoid these crashes. I'll create a much simpler model that processes the spatiotemporal data in a more straightforward way.
